# oidc

Golden conversion cases under this subsystem.

| Case | Direction | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [clientsecret-dollar-ref](clientsecret-dollar-ref.md) | `roundtrip` | oidc.config clientSecret $ref must become a SecretKeySelector, not a literal |
| [full-config](full-config.md) | `roundtrip` | Full OIDC config from operator-manual SSO docs (Azure AD, claims, scopes, audiences, userinfo, PKCE, rootCA) |
